summary: Validated requested Firebase auth readiness, camera composer flow, channels hub visibility, and channel/broadcast backend routes. Backend pytest regression passed (5/5) and targeted mobile UI integration checks passed for login phone modal, feed camera upload->composer->publish, and Feed > Channels.

integration_issues.issue: Browser console shows one 401 resource call before user login (likely expected auth probe, but noisy).

action_items: Optionally suppress/handle pre-login 401 console noise if it is from an intentional auth-check call.
Refactor /app/backend/server.py into smaller modules (file is significantly oversized for maintainability).
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large (>1300 lines) and should be modularized (auth, channels, broadcast, feed, socket).
Phone OTP fallback endpoints still hardcode firebase_ready=false in responses, which can be confusing when Firebase is configured and active.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* channel, draft, and broadcast-list records via API during automated tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Backend coverage added for /api/auth/firebase/status, /api/channels, /api/channels/{id}/drafts, and /api/broadcast-lists. UI mobile run validated login phone modal Firebase-ready message, feed camera upload/composer/publish flow, and Feed > Channels hub load.
rca of the issue: No blocking failures. Only observed minor pre-login 401 console entry, likely from auth state probing before token exists.
